results.title: Octomore 13 Series Review (13.1, 13.2 & 13.3) - Two Whisky Bros
results.description: It's not bad, it has a good mouthfeel, some nice sweet notes, but a little too hot and lacks the peat punch we wanted.

results.title: Bruichladdich Octomore 13.1. » Buy Online - Flaviar
results.description: It's made from a 2015 harvest of 100% Scottish Mainland barley and aged for 5 years in American oak. It also has a nice 'little' kick to it with 59.2% ABV.
